name: Freezing Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meat loaf mixture according to your recipe but do not bake it yet.
2. Place the uncooked meat loaf in a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil or place in an airtight container.
3. Refrigerate the meat loaf for several hours, or overnight, until it is completely thawed.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Remove the meat loaf from the refrigerator and bake for 30 to 45 minutes at 350°F (175°C), checking after 30 minutes to ensure it has reached a safe internal temperature of 160°F (71°C). If necessary, continue baking until fully cooked.
6. Allow the meat loaf to cool before serving or freezing again.
